# Fixture: p3b_yes_not_optout
# Model: haiku
# Duration: 15.7s
# Exit: 0
# Failures: 0

## CONVERSATION
Concierge: Hi Maria! Welcome to Shiftsmart. Your first step is to complete your orientation in the app and you get paid $10 when you finish it!
Partner: Yes 

## CONCIERGE OUTPUT
Open the Shiftsmart app → Home tab → look for the white "In-app orientation" card with the $10. Tap "Get started" to begin.
